sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_data (id INT, value NUMERIC, nullable_col NUMERIC NULL);
INSERT INTO test_data (id, value, nullable_col) VALUES (1, 5, 10), (2, NULL, -3), (3, -7.5, NULL), (4, 0, 0);
SELECT id, sign(value) AS sign_value FROM test_data WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, value, sign(nullable_col) AS sign_nullable FROM test_data WHERE nullable_col IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, value, CASE WHEN sign(value) IS NOT NULL THEN 'Valid' ELSE 'Invalid' END AS validity FROM test_data;
SELECT id, sign(value) AS sign_value FROM test_data WHERE sign(value) IS NOT NULL AND value <> 0;
SELECT id, sign(value) AS sign_value FROM test_data WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_data WHERE nullable_col IS NOT NULL AND sign(nullable_col) = -1);
SELECT id, AVG(sign(value)) OVER (PARTITION BY sign(value)) AS avg_sign_value FROM test_data GROUP BY id, value HAVING sign(value) IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE temp_test (ref_id INT, temp_value NUMERIC, temp_col NUMERIC NULL);
INSERT INTO temp_test (ref_id, temp_value, temp_col) VALUES (1, 5, 2.5), (2, -3.2, NULL), (3, 0, 0);
SELECT tt.ref_id, tt.temp_value, sign(tt.temp_value) AS temp_sign FROM temp_test tt JOIN test_data td ON tt.ref_id = td.id WHERE td.value IS NOT NULL AND sign(td.value) = 1;
SELECT DISTINCT sign(td.value) FROM test_data td WHERE td.value IS NOT NULL ORDER BY sign(td.value) DESC;
SELECT id, sign(COALESCE(nullable_col, 0)) AS sign_nullable FROM test_data GROUP BY id HAVING sign(nullable_col) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, sign(value) AS sign_value FROM test_data WHERE value IS NOT NULL ORDER BY sign(value) DESC LIMIT 5;
